name: Sound Stride — Hip & Joint Botanical Blend
shortDescription: A field-guide classic for the active dog: turmeric root, glucosamine, and green-lipped mussel, milled small-batch to support healthy joints and easy movement through every season.

name: Kettle & Root — Digestive Comfort Blend
shortDescription: Slippery elm bark, pumpkin seed, and fennel in a gentle daily preparation that promotes normal digestion and helps maintain a balanced gut.

name: Gloss & Burr — Skin & Coat Preparation
shortDescription: Cold-pressed flaxseed, nettle leaf, and biotin-rich brewer's yeast, blended to support supple skin and a glossy, show-worthy coat.

name: Still Waters — Calming Botanical Blend
shortDescription: Chamomile flower, passionflower, and L-theanine in a quiet evening blend that helps maintain a calm, settled disposition during travel, storms, and busy households.

name: The Daily Compendium — Whole-Food Multivitamin
shortDescription: An everyday foundation of spirulina, kelp, and rosehip, thoughtfully balanced to support overall vitality from nose to tail.

name: Hale & Hardy — Immune Support Blend
shortDescription: Turkey tail mushroom, elderberry, and astragalus root, gathered into one hearty blend that supports a healthy, resilient immune system year-round.
